---
name: 🐛 Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## How to reproduce
1. Command you ran: `python main.py --goal "..."` 
2. Provider: <openai | anthropic | groq | ollama>
3. Model: <e.g. gpt-4o-mini>
4. OS / Python: <e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 / Python 3.11>

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Paste relevant logs.

## Agent memory dump (optional but very helpful)

If a run produced `outputs/agent_memory.json`, attach or paste relevant excerpts.

## Additional context

Anything else worth knowing.
